upgrade_modal.title: Upgrade Required
upgrade_modal.default_message: You have reached the limit for your current plan.
upgrade_modal.checkout_error: Failed to create checkout. Please try again.
upgrade_modal.stripe_available_in_pro: Stripe is available in Pro. Upgrade to configure card payments for your store.
upgrade_modal.pro_trial_hint: {days}-day free trial. Then {yearly} per year (annual billing only).

features.advanced_stats: Advanced stats (per store, per PoS, overall)
features.pos_cash_card: PoS: mark orders as "Paid in Cash" or "Paid by Card" (for accounting)
features.business_invoicing: Business invoicing (PDF, ISDOC/UBL, SK e-invoicing, Pay by Square, Bitcoin)
features.invoicing_expenses: Expenses, attachments, and bulk ISDOC import

invoicing.title: Business invoicing
invoicing.subtitle: Company profiles, contacts, and invoices with bank QR, ISDOC/UBL export, and optional SK e-invoicing via your CPDS.
invoicing.pro_required: Business invoicing is available on the Pro plan.
invoicing.pro_required_detail: Pro includes SK/CZ invoices, EU VIES VAT ID checks, ISDOC and Peppol UBL export, payment matching, and connection to your own digital postman (SAPI-SK).
invoicing.vat_number_hint: Format e.g. SK2023980035. Verify in one click via VIES (EU VAT registry).
invoicing.company_limit_reached: You have reached the limit of {max} companies on your plan. Contact us for Enterprise (unlimited).
invoicing.no_companies: You have no company profile yet.
invoicing.stock_field_exclude_suggester: Exclude this item from the line suggester
invoicing.stock_sale_currency_hint: Sale price is in company currency ({currency}).
invoicing.stock_import_intro: Upload an Excel file in the prescribed format.
invoicing.stock_import_drop: Click or drag files here (max 2 MB).
invoicing.stock_import_file_too_large: File is too large. Maximum size is 2 MB.
invoicing.stock_import_file_invalid: Please upload an Excel (.xlsx, .xls) or CSV file.
invoicing.stock_import_mapping_hint: Map spreadsheet columns to stock fields.
invoicing.warehouse_set_default: Default warehouse for new document lines
invoicing.warehouse_type_own_hint: Your stock - deducted when an invoice is issued.
invoicing.warehouse_type_owned_external_hint: Your stock at a partner or branch - deducted on issue.
invoicing.warehouse_type_supplier_availability_hin: Informational only - not deducted on invoice issue.
invoicing.warehouse_no_deduct_hint: This warehouse does not deduct stock on invoice issue.
invoicing.stock_transfer_invalid: Choose different source and destination warehouses.
invoicing.stock_transfer_invalid_quantity: Enter a valid quantity greater than zero.
invoicing.expenses_empty_hint: Create a new expense or import data from Excel.
invoicing.expense_import_intro: Import expenses from an Excel export (e.g. SuperFaktura).
invoicing.expense_import_drop: Click or drag a file here
invoicing.expense_import_mapping_hint: Map file columns to expense fields.
invoicing.expense_attach_import_intro: Upload a ZIP archive or PDFs from SuperFaktura. Files are matched to expenses by number in the filename.
invoicing.expense_attach_import_sf_hint: In SuperFaktura, set the PDF name to include the expense internal number (e.g. #CISLO# or 2026001). Import Excel first, then download the PDF export (Tools → Export agendas).
invoicing.expense_attach_import_drop: Click or drag ZIP / PDF here
invoicing.expense_overdue_days: {count} days overdue | {count} day overdue | {count} days overdue
invoicing.expense_import_prefilled: Fields were extracted from ISDOC. Review before saving.
invoicing.expense_attachment_isdoc_hint: After you upload a PDF or ISDOC file, we check for embedded ISDOC and offer to extract the fields.
invoicing.expense_attachment_drop_hint: Drag and drop a file here, or click to browse
invoicing.expense_attachment_drop_hint_multiple: Drag and drop one or more files here, or click to browse
invoicing.expense_attachment_pending_count: {count} files will upload when you save the expense.
invoicing.expense_no_isdoc_in_file: File attached. No ISDOC found in this PDF – you can fill in the fields manually.
invoicing.expense_preview_file_attached: File ready. Preview is not available for this format.
invoicing.expense_isdoc_detected_body: This document contains ISDOC. Extract data into the form? ({remaining} of {limit} free extractions left.)
invoicing.expense_isdoc_detected_body_unlimited: This document contains ISDOC. Extract data into the form?
invoicing.expense_isdoc_quota_exceeded: Your 20 free extractions are used up. Buy a pack below (pay via BTCPay).
invoicing.expense_isdoc_detected_body_mixed: This document contains ISDOC. You have {freeRemaining} of {freeLimit} free and {purchased} purchased extractions left.
invoicing.expense_isdoc_detected_body_purchased: This document contains ISDOC. {purchased} purchased extractions remaining.
invoicing.expense_isdoc_packs_pay_btcpay: Pay with Bitcoin / Lightning via BTCPay. After payment, refresh or try extract again.
invoicing.no_proformas: No proforma invoices match this filter.
invoicing.recurring_last_day_month: Always issue on last day of month
invoicing.recurring_placeholders_hint: Replaced with real values when the invoice is issued.
invoicing.recurring_generate_confirm: Issue a document from this schedule now?
invoicing.no_credit_notes: No credit notes match this filter.
invoicing.credit_note_link_hint: To keep document continuity, we recommend linking the credited invoice to this credit note.
invoicing.efaktura_intro: Connect your certified digital postman (CPDS) to send and receive structured Peppol invoices (mandatory for SK domestic B2B from 1 Jan 2027). Obtain API credentials from your provider after registering on the Financial Administration portal.
invoicing.efaktura_cpds_note: Each CPDS has its own API base URL - enter the URL from your provider, not a single global Satflux setting.
invoicing.efaktura_sapi_base_url_hint: Production or sandbox URL of your digital postman (e.g. ePošták, Flowis).
invoicing.efaktura_peppol_participant_id_hint: Your company's Peppol identifier - usually scheme 0245 and tax ID.
invoicing.efaktura_sapi_client_secret_placeholder_: Leave empty to keep the current secret
invoicing.efaktura_sapi_client_secret_saved: Secret is saved. Fill in only when changing it.
invoicing.efaktura_auto_send: Automatically send after issuing an SK B2B invoice
invoicing.efaktura_inbound_hint: Satflux periodically polls your CPDS and imports new documents as expenses.
invoicing.efaktura_panel_not_eligible: Applies only to issued invoices and credit notes with a Slovak customer (domestic B2B).
invoicing.efaktura_panel_not_sent: This document has not been sent via your digital postman yet.
invoicing.efaktura_inbound_never_polled: No manual or scheduled import has run yet.
invoicing.contact_peppol_participant_id_hint: Optional - when tax ID or company ID is not enough. Format scheme:identifier (e.g. 0245:tax ID).
invoicing.company_phone_hint: Shown in the footer of your invoices.
invoicing.profile_save_note: Profile changes do not affect already issued documents.
invoicing.import_files_hint: Upload an Excel (.xls, .xlsx) or CSV file.
invoicing.import_mapping_hint: Match file columns to invoice fields.
invoicing.import_paid_hint: Fill payment date only when the invoice is already paid.
invoicing.import_confirm_summary: Up to {count} invoices will be imported (issued, or paid when payment date is set).
invoicing.import_create_contacts: Create or link contacts from client data
invoicing.import_create_contacts_hint: If a contact with the same registration number or name exists, missing fields are filled in. Otherwise a new contact is created.
invoicing.company_reset_desc: Deletes all invoices, contacts, expenses, bank payments, recurring profiles, and resets number series. Company profile, settings, and branding are kept.
invoicing.company_reset_confirm_desc: This cannot be undone. The following will be deleted:
invoicing.company_reset_item_sequences: number series counters reset to zero
invoicing.company_reset_confirm_label: Type the company name to confirm: {name}
invoicing.email_delivery_system_hint: Emails are sent using the satflux.io default mail configuration.
invoicing.email_oauth_coming_soon: Gmail and Office will be available in a future update. Use system or custom SMTP for now.
invoicing.email_smtp_use_login_as_from: Use SMTP email as From address
invoicing.email_template_placeholders_hint: Words in #TAG# form are replaced with document data when sending.
invoicing.series_format_hint: R = year, M = month, C = counter (number of C = digit width). Other letters are a fixed prefix.
invoicing.vies_valid: VAT ID is valid in VIES
invoicing.vies_invalid: VAT ID is not valid in VIES
invoicing.us_sales_tax_hint: Manual line rates or Stripe Tax (customer ZIP + state required). Avalara is not wired yet.
invoicing.stripe_tax_secret_placeholder: sk_live_… or leave empty to use STRIPE_TAX_SECRET_KEY from .env
invoicing.app_opt_pay_by_square: Show Pay by Square on invoices
invoicing.app_opt_invoice_by_square: Show Invoice by Square on invoices
invoicing.app_save_note: Changes do not affect issued documents or recurring invoice templates.
invoicing.bank_account_hint: Account number is shown on invoices so clients know where to pay.
invoicing.company_logo_hint: Shown on invoices in the top-left (PNG or JPG, max 2 MB).
invoicing.company_signature_stamp_hint: Shown on the invoice when PDF signature is enabled. Upload one combined image.
invoicing.company_branding_after_create: You can upload logo and stamp after saving, on the company settings page.
invoicing.company_create_us_tax_hint: Configure US sales tax after saving the company, under Application settings.
invoicing.company_settings_us_tax_hint: Configure Stripe Tax or Avalara in the Application tab. VAT and VIES do not apply to US companies.
invoicing.us_default_sales_tax_rate_hint: Use 0% for EU export without US sales tax. Applies to new invoice lines and automatic subscription invoices when tax is manual.
invoicing.company_store_link_hint: A company can have at most one linked BTCPay store (used for Bitcoin payments on invoices).
invoicing.payment_btc_lazy_hint: The PDF QR encodes a payment page link (not a direct Lightning invoice). The customer opens it in a browser, then continues to BTCPay.
invoicing.bank_import_help: Upload a bank statement (CAMT.053 XML or CSV export from your bank). Payments are matched to invoices by variable symbol and amount.
invoicing.bank_inbound_help: Configure your bank to send movement notifications to this address (must come directly from the bank, not forwarded). Banks allow at most {max} characters.
invoicing.bank_inbound_disabled: Inbound email is not enabled on this server yet.
invoicing.bank_inbound_copy_failed: Could not copy address to clipboard
invoicing.bank_no_transactions: No bank transactions for this filter.
invoicing.bank_no_bank_account: Bank movements are available after you configure the company bank account (IBAN or account number).
invoicing.bank_no_suggestions: No issued invoices match this payment.
invoicing.readonly_locked_hint: Paid or cancelled invoices cannot be edited. Duplicate to create a new draft.
invoicing.issued_edit_hint: You can edit issued invoices. Changing the total or store refreshes the BTCPay checkout link on the PDF.
invoicing.btcpay_refresh_hint: Changing the total, store, or BTC payment creates a new BTCPay checkout (the old link will no longer match).
invoicing.contact_import_intro: Import your contacts easily from Excel.
invoicing.contact_import_drop: Click or drag a file here
invoicing.contact_import_mapping_hint: Map file columns to contact fields.
invoicing.contact_name_placeholder: Start typing name or company ID…
invoicing.registry_lookup_hint: Suggestions from the business registry (subjekt.sk). Pick a company to fill ID, tax numbers, and address.
invoicing.registry_lookup_hint_openregistry: Suggestions from the official registry (OpenRegistry). Pick a row to fill ID and address; full detail may need OPENREGISTRY_BEARER_TOKEN.
invoicing.registry_lookup_manual: Enter details manually for this country.
invoicing.registry_lookup_manual_vies: No registry autocomplete. You can still verify EU VAT ID via VIES.
invoicing.registry_lookup_offshore_manual: Offshore registries are not connected - enter details manually.
invoicing.registry_lookup_sk_cz_only: Registry autocomplete is only available for Slovak and Czech companies (SK/CZ jurisdiction or country).
invoicing.registry_lookup_us_manual: For US companies, enter details manually (free subjekt.sk registry covers Slovakia and Czechia only).
invoicing.registry_unavailable: Registry is temporarily unavailable. Enter details manually.
invoicing.contact_changes_note: Changes will not affect documents already issued
invoicing.confirm_bulk_delete_contacts: Delete selected clients? Clients with issued invoices will be anonymized (details removed, record kept for document history).
invoicing.internal_note_placeholder: Private note, not shown on the invoice PDF
invoicing.internal_note_hint: Visible only in satflux, not on the client PDF.
invoicing.send_coming_soon: Email sending is planned for a later phase
invoicing.email_indicator_sent: Email sent – click to send again
invoicing.email_indicator_disabled: Email is available after the document is issued
invoicing.confirm_unmark_paid: Remove payment and return this invoice to issued status? You can edit it afterwards.
invoicing.unmark_paid_edit_hint: After removing payment you can edit or cancel the invoice.
invoicing.confirm_delete_last: Permanently delete this invoice? Only allowed for the latest invoice (or a cancelled one).
invoicing.edit_company_on_invoice: » Edit my details on this invoice
invoicing.draft_issue_hint: This document is a draft. Issue it to assign a number, enable PDF, and record payment.

common.info_page_subtitle: Version, legal documents, open source, and support.

auth.enter_email_reset: Enter your email to receive a reset link
auth.password_reset_sent: Password reset link sent to your email.
auth.failed_send_reset: Failed to send reset link. Please try again.
auth.password_reset_successful: Your password has been reset. You can now log in.
auth.reset_failed: Failed to reset password. The link may be invalid or expired.
auth.email_verified_success: Your email has been verified successfully. Redirecting...
auth.verifying_email_wait: Please wait while we verify your email address...
auth.failed_to_connect: Failed to connect to server. Please try again.
auth.failed_to_verify_email_link: Failed to verify email. The link may be invalid or expired.
auth.email_verified: Your email has been verified successfully. Please login to continue.
auth.scan_qr_code: Scan this QR code with a Lightning wallet that supports LNURL-auth (e.g., Breez, Phoenix, Alby).
auth.provide_email_to_complete: Please provide your email address to complete registration.
auth.error_occurred: An error occurred. Please try again.
auth.registration_successful: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account.
auth.failed_to_complete_registration: Failed to complete registration. Please try again.
auth.verification_email_resent: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.
auth.nostr_choose_method: Choose how to sign in with your Nostr key:
auth.nostr_nip07_hint: Alby, nos2x, or other Nostr extension
auth.nostr_nip46_use_extension: For NIP-46 (e.g. nsecBunker), use your signer app to approve the login. If your signer injects NIP-07 in the browser, use the Extension option below.
auth.nostr_nsec_not_recommended: Not recommended - key can be exposed
auth.nostr_nsec_warning: Your private key will only be used in this browser to sign the login. It is never sent to the server. Still, using an extension or remote signer is safer.
auth.nostr_extension_required: No Nostr extension found. Install Alby, nos2x, or similar.
auth.register_passwordless_hint: Use Lightning or Nostr sign-in from the login page.
auth.restore_guest_session: Restore guest session with backup phrase
auth.guest_cta_hint: Instant start for PoS. No email needed.
auth.guest_mode_short_intro: No email to start. Your 24-word phrase signs you in on other devices—keep it offline. Add email or Lightning/Nostr anytime.
auth.guest_mode_limitations: We never store your phrase—without it we cannot restore access. Until you add email or Lightning/Nostr, you rely on the phrase or this browser’s guest session. Free-plan limits apply.
auth.guest_backup_intro: We will generate a 24-word recovery phrase. Write it down and store it offline. With it you can sign in as this guest on another device.
auth.guest_backup_warning: Anyone with this phrase can access your guest account. Do not share it or store it in email or cloud photos.
auth.guest_backup_confirm_checkbox: I have written down my 24-word phrase and stored it safely.
auth.guest_restore_hint: Enter the same 24-word phrase you saved when you created the guest account.
auth.guest_restore_error: Could not restore. Check your phrase and try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.get_started_description: Create a store to start accepting Bitcoin payments.
dashboard.upgrade_to_see_stats: Upgrade to Pro to see sales statistics and charts.
dashboard.stats_available_in_pro_message: Sales statistics and charts across your stores are available in Pro. Upgrade to see order counts, trends, and filter by store.

stores.title: Stores
stores.create_first_store_description: Create your first store to start accepting Bitcoin payments seamlessly.
stores.recommended_price_source: The recommended price source gets chosen based on the default currency.
stores.blink_description: Use Blink wallet for fast and reliable Lightning payments.
stores.aqua_description: Aqua or Bull Bitcoin Wallet with the Boltz plugin — non-custodial Lightning.
stores.blink_paste: Paste your Blink connection string with server URL, API key, and wallet ID.
stores.descriptor_paste: Paste your Aqua or Bull Bitcoin watch-only output descriptor (no private keys).
stores.configure_later: You can also configure this later in Wallet Connection settings.
stores.aqua_warning_btcpay: The Aqua/Bull (Boltz) wallet in BTCPay cannot be removed. It will only be removed when the store is deleted.
stores.aqua_limits_warning: Aqua has min/max limits (100-25,000,000 sats). It is not ideal for micropayments (zaps) and may have higher fees.
stores.blink_keys_warning: Create API keys with only "read" and "receive" permissions. Never use "write" - it would allow spending from your wallet.
stores.cashu_beta_notice_short: Cashu (BTCPay CashuMelt) is experimental. Invoices may show as paid before funds reach your Lightning wallet; mint outages or routing issues can cause loss or delay.
stores.cashu_beta_consent_checkbox: I understand Cashu is in beta and I accept the risks for myself and my customers.
stores.cashu_description: Ecash with a Cashu mint: mint URL plus a Lightning Address for plugin routing.
stores.wallet_connection_choose_wallet: This store does not have a wallet type yet, or you are choosing how to connect. Pick Cashu (mint + Lightning Address) or a classic Lightning wallet (Blink or Aqua descriptor).
stores.wallet_connection_choose_lightning_hint: Connection string or watch-only descriptor, same as on create store.
stores.wallet_connection_unsupported_title: Wallet type not supported on this screen
stores.wallet_connection_unsupported_body: This store is set to “{type}”. Configure it in BTCPay or contact support if you expected Cashu or Lightning options here.
stores.wallet_connection_switch_to_cashu_hint: Configure mint URL and Lightning Address instead of a Lightning wallet connection.
stores.aqua_wallet_connected_samrock_hint: Your wallet is already linked. You can generate a new SamRock QR to re-pair or switch to the Descriptor tab to update the watch-only descriptor.
stores.cashu_connected_via_plugin: Configured via the BTCPay Cashu plugin.
stores.cashu_mint_url_hint:
Examples: https://mint.minibits.cash/Bitcoin,
https://mint.coinos.io, https://mint.103100.xyz
- always use the full URL from your wallet or mint operator (paths like /Bitcoin are common).
stores.cashu_lightning_address_hint: Format user{'@'}domain - must be able to receive; used by the plugin for Lightning-related flows.
stores.cashu_lightning_address_coinos_prefix: Don't have a Lightning address yet? You can get one at
stores.cashu_unit_hint: How amounts are interpreted for Cashu invoices in BTCPay (plugin defaults to sats when unset).
stores.cashu_trusted_mint_urls_hint: When set, the primary mint URL must be one of these HTTPS URLs (normalized). One URL per line.
stores.cashu_max_melt_fee_sats_hint: Upper cap on melt fee reserve in satoshis. Leave empty for no limit.
stores.cashu_max_melt_fee_percent_label: Max melt fee reserve (% of minted)
stores.cashu_max_melt_fee_percent_hint: Cap as 0-100% of minted amount. Leave empty for no limit.
stores.cashu_warning_https: The mint URL must use https:// - insecure HTTP URLs are rejected.
stores.cashu_warning_mint_reachable: A wrong, offline, or blocked mint URL can cause failed invoices or settlements.
stores.cashu_warning_ln_address: A typo in the Lightning Address breaks payments; it must match the wallet you intend to use.
stores.cashu_payments_subtitle: Settlement rows from the BTCPay Cashu plugin for this store.
stores.cashu_section_requires_cashu_wallet: Cashu settlements are only available for stores that use Cashu as the wallet type.
stores.descriptor_already_in_use: This descriptor is already in use
stores.descriptor_btcpay_once: BTCPay allows each descriptor to be used only once. Please use a different wallet/descriptor.
stores.failed_to_create: Failed to create store. Please try again.
stores.checklist_needs_wallet_type: This store does not have a wallet type yet. Finish setup in Wallet connection first.
stores.all_steps_required: Check items off after you verify them. All are recommended unless marked optional.
stores.failed_to_update_settings: Failed to update settings. Please try again.
stores.additional_settings_description: Additional store configuration options are managed through the satflux.io interface. All settings that can be configured are available above or through other satflux.io sections.
stores.archive_app_available_in_pro_message: Archive app is available in Pro and above. Upgrade to archive and unarchive your apps.
stores.featured_image_need_store: Store must be loaded before uploading an image.
stores.featured_image_uploaded: Featured image uploaded. Save the form to apply.
stores.featured_image_upload_failed: Could not upload image. Try again or paste an image URL.
stores.featured_image_help: Shown on the crowdfund header. Paste a URL or choose a file; files upload when you save.
stores.crowdfund_make_public_hint: The crowdfund will be visible to anyone.
stores.crowdfund_description_rich_hint: Formatting appears on the public BTCPay crowdfund page.
stores.crowdfund_recurring_hint: Reset goal after a specific period of time, based on your crowdfund's start date.
stores.crowdfund_remove_perk_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this perk?
stores.crowdfund_perks_json_hint: Edit raw JSON configuration for perks.
stores.crowdfund_invalid_perks_json: Invalid JSON in perks code view.
stores.crowdfund_no_extra_after_target: Disable additional contributions after target reached
stores.crowdfund_no_extra_after_target_hint: Prevent new payments once goal is met
stores.crowdfund_count_all_invoices: Count all store invoices towards goal
stores.crowdfund_count_all_invoices_hint: Include invoices created outside this crowdfund app
stores.crowdfund_checkout_form_hint: Same options as in BTCPay Server. Custom store forms keep their ID until you pick another option.
stores.crowdfund_adv_meta_placeholder:
<meta name="description" content="Your description">
<meta name="keywords" content="keyword1, keyword2">
stores.crowdfund_adv_meta_help: Must be valid HTML meta tags.
stores.crowdfund_adv_sounds_lines_label: Sounds to play when a payment is made
stores.crowdfund_adv_animations_enable: Enable background animations on new payments
stores.crowdfund_perk_id_hint: Leave blank to generate ID from title.
stores.crowdfund_perk_categories_hint: Filter items using categories (used in product list with cart).
stores.crowdfund_perk_inventory_placeholder: Leave blank for unlimited, 0 = out of stock
stores.crowdfund_perk_inventory_hint: Leave blank to not use this feature.
stores.archived_store_banner: The store has been archived and will no longer appear in the stores list by default.
stores.guest_nav_locked_hint: Create a full account in Account to unlock this feature.
stores.guest_one_store_hint: Guest accounts can have one store. Upgrade in Account to add more.
stores.guest_pos_limit_hint: Guest accounts can have one Point of Sale app. Upgrade in Account for more terminals.
stores.reports_subtitle: History of exported data and download links.
stores.reports_subtitle_monthly: Monthly automatic reports - history and download links.
stores.reports_monthly_will_appear_here: Monthly reports generated on the 1st of each month will appear here.
stores.reports_will_appear_here: Exports from the Invoices section will appear here.
stores.reports_upgrade_message: Download and retry are available in Pro. Upgrade to unlock full Reports features and automatic monthly exports.
stores.confirm_delete_report: Delete this report? This cannot be undone.
stores.pdf_report_popup_blocked: Pop-up was blocked. Allow pop-ups for this site to download the PDF.
stores.pdf_report_unauth: Please log in again to download the PDF.
stores.create_lightning_address_description: Create a Lightning Address to receive payments easily via a reusable address format your-username{'@'}{domain}.
stores.remove_lightning_address_confirm_before: Are you sure you want to remove
stores.api_key_regenerated_body: Save it now. You will not be able to see it again.
stores.manage_api_keys_for: Manage API keys for connecting your e-shop (WooCommerce, etc.) to
stores.create_api_key_description: Create an API key to connect external services like WooCommerce or other e-commerce platforms to your store.
stores.api_key_callback_url_hint: If provided, the API key will be automatically sent to this URL upon creation.
stores.api_key_limit_reached: You have reached the maximum number of API keys ({max}) for your current plan.
stores.store_limit_reached: You have reached the maximum number of stores ({max}) for your current plan.
stores.pos_advanced_options_pro_only: Advanced options can be edited on Pro plan and above. Upgrade to change these settings.
stores.pay_button_warning_title: Warning: Payment button should only be used for tips and donations
stores.pay_button_warning_text: Using the payment button for e-commerce integrations is not recommended since order relevant information can be modified by the user. For e-commerce, you should use our Greenfield API. If this store process commercial transactions, we advise you to create a separate store before using the payment button.
stores.pay_button_enable_description: To start using Pay Button, you need to enable this feature explicitly. Once you do so, anyone could create an invoice on your store (via API, for example).
stores.stripe_test_mode_banner: Test Mode: Using Stripe test API keys. Payments will not be real.
stores.stripe_webhook_signing_secret_help: The webhook signing secret from Stripe (starts with whsec_). Required for secure webhook verification. Get from Stripe Dashboard → select webhook → Signing secret → Reveal.
stores.stripe_enable_description: Accept card payments via Stripe for this store.
stores.stripe_key_keep_placeholder: Leave empty to keep current key
stores.stripe_publishable_key_help: Your Stripe publishable API key (starts with pk_).
stores.stripe_secret_key_help: Your Stripe secret API key (starts with sk_).
stores.stripe_settlement_currency_help: Currency for Stripe charges (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).
stores.stripe_save_keys_first: Save your API keys first to configure webhooks.
stores.stripe_advanced_config_help: Optional JSON to customize PaymentIntent creation. Supported: payment_method_types, metadata, statement_descriptor_suffix, capture_method, setup_future_usage.
stores.stripe_clear_credentials_description: Remove API keys and webhook from BTCPay Server. Stripe will be disabled.
stores.stripe_clear_confirm_message: This will remove your API keys and webhook. Stripe payments will be disabled. This action cannot be undone.
stores.currency_placeholder: Select or type currency (e.g., USD, BTC, EUR)
stores.blink_connection_description: Connect your Blink wallet using a read+receive API key. Best for speed and reliability.
stores.aqua_connection_description: Connect a watch-only wallet using an output descriptor. Non-custodial Setup.
stores.samrock_description: Generate a one-time QR code and scan it in Aqua to configure Bitcoin, Lightning (Boltz), and optionally Liquid. For Bull Bitcoin, use the Descriptor tab and paste your watch-only descriptor.
stores.samrock_waiting_scan: Scan this QR in Aqua. Waiting for wallet to finish setup on BTCPay…
stores.samrock_connected_note: This store was linked using Aqua + SamRock (QR). BTCPay holds your receive configuration; Satflux stores no wallet descriptor.
stores.samrock_or_manual: Or enter your watch-only descriptor manually below.
stores.manual_config_required: Manual configuration by support team may be required.
stores.confirm_password_to_change: Enter your password to view or change the wallet connection.
stores.reveal_error: Could not load connection details. Please try again.
stores.connection_active_description: This store is ready to accept transactions. Good job!
stores.configuration_in_progress_description: Your wallet connection is being configured by our support team. You'll be notified when it's ready.
stores.connection_pending_description: Please wait while we process your wallet connection request.
stores.wallet_not_configured_description: To start accepting payments, please configure your wallet connection in
stores.create_first_invoice: Create your first invoice to start accepting payments.
stores.configure_wallet_connection: Configure your Lightning wallet connection for
stores.sales_volume_period: Sales volume in the selected period
stores.manage_store_config: Manage your store configuration and preferences.
stores.settings_tab_payment_desc: Default currency, timezone, invoice expiration, network fee, speed policy, and related options.
stores.settings_tab_lightning_desc: Lightning Network and LNURL options. LNURL is enabled by default for Lightning Addresses.
stores.email_rules_intro: Create rules to send automatic emails for invoice events. Choose a trigger, recipients, and optional condition so emails are sent only in relevant situations.
stores.email_rules_empty: No email rules yet. Add one to notify yourself or customers on invoice events.

email_rules_trigger_desc.InvoiceReceivedPayment: A payment has been detected for the invoice.
email_rules_trigger_desc.InvoiceExpired: Invoice expired without being fully paid.
email_rules_trigger_desc.InvoiceSettled: Invoice is fully paid and settled.
email_rules_trigger_desc.InvoicePaymentSettled: A specific payment for the invoice reached settled state.
email_rules_trigger_desc.InvoiceExpiredPaidPartial: Invoice expired and was only partially paid.
email_rules_trigger_desc.InvoicePaidAfterExpiration: Payment arrived after the invoice already expired.

stores.email_rules_condition_hint: If set, requires the galbar/jsonpath Composer package. Use JSONPath against a model with Invoice and Store objects (see docs). Leave empty to always run when the trigger matches.
stores.email_rules_send_buyer: Send to buyer email when present on the invoice
stores.email_rules_placeholder_examples_meta_no: Metadata fields depend on the specific invoice (plugin/app). If a key is missing in metadata, the placeholder stays unchanged.
stores.settings_tab_archived_desc: Archive this store to hide it from the main store list. Archived stores can still receive payments.
stores.settings_tab_rates_desc: Set the preferred price source and additional currencies to track. Rates are used for pricing and reports.
stores.settings_tab_checkout_desc: Default language, receipt, redirect, and other checkout options. These apply to the invoice/checkout experience.
stores.settings_tab_users_desc: Add and remove store users and assign roles. All managed in this panel.
stores.settings_tab_roles_desc: Roles define what each user can do in this store. Assign roles in the Users tab.
stores.settings_tab_webhooks_desc: Webhooks send HTTP events from your store to another server.
stores.settings_users_managed_in_panel: Store users and their roles are managed here. You can add or remove users and assign roles (Owner, Manager, Employee, Guest) when the user list is loaded.
stores.settings_webhooks_not_in_panel: Webhook management is not available in the panel at this time.
stores.settings_role_owner: Owner - Full access: settings, users, apps, invoices, and can delete the store.
stores.settings_role_manager: Manager - Can manage settings, apps, and invoices; cannot manage users or delete the store.
stores.settings_role_employee: Employee - Can view the store and create invoices; limited settings access.
stores.settings_role_guest: Guest - Read-only access to the store.
stores.settings_branding_desc: Custom color, logo, and CSS apply to public and customer-facing pages. Brand color is used as an accent.
stores.settings_fee_btc_ltc_only: Fee is shown for BTC and LTC on-chain payments only.
stores.settings_consider_paid_less: Consider invoice paid if amount is … % less (percent)
stores.settings_payment_invalid_after: Payment invalid if not confirmed after expiration (minutes)
stores.settings_invoice_settled_when: Consider invoice settled when payment has
stores.settings_additional_rates_desc: Comma-separated list of currencies (e.g. USD, EUR, JPY). Rates are recorded and available in reports.
stores.settings_enable_payment_when_amount: Enable payment methods only when amount is …
stores.settings_timer_before_expiration: Show a timer … minutes before invoice expiration
stores.settings_unify_onchain_ln: Unify on-chain and lightning payment URL/QR code
stores.settings_lightning_satoshis: Display Lightning payment amounts in Satoshis
stores.settings_lightning_hop_hints: Add hop hints for private channels to the Lightning invoice
stores.settings_lnurl_classic_mode_desc: For wallet compatibility: Bech32 encoded (classic) vs. cleartext URL (upcoming).
stores.settings_lnurl_allow_payee_comment: Allow payee to pass a comment
stores.settings_auto_detect_language_desc: Detects the language of the customer's browser.
stores.settings_html_title: Custom HTML title to display on Checkout page
stores.settings_support_url_desc: A "Contact Us" button with this link will be shown on the checkout page. Can contain the placeholders {OrderId} and {InvoiceId}. Can be any valid URI, such as a website, email, and Nostr.
stores.settings_lazy_payment_methods: Only enable the payment method after user explicitly chooses it
stores.settings_redirect_automatically: Redirect invoice to redirect url automatically after paid
stores.settings_receipt_enabled: Enable public receipt page for settled invoices
stores.settings_receipt_show_payments: Show the payment list in the public receipt page
stores.settings_receipt_show_qr: Show the QR code of the receipt in the public receipt page
stores.settings_delete_store_desc: This will permanently delete the store {name} and all its data, including invoices, apps, and settings. This action cannot be undone.
stores.settings_delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
stores.settings_load_failed: Could not load store settings. Check your connection and try again.
stores.view_manage_transactions: View and manage your store transactions.
stores.export_queued_check_reports: Export job queued. You will receive an email when the file is ready.
stores.xlsx_export_available_in_pro_message: XLSX export is available in Pro and above. Upgrade to export invoices as Excel files.
stores.adjust_filters_create_invoice: Try adjusting your filters or create a new invoice.
stores.exports_will_appear_here: Exports generated from Invoices section will appear here.
stores.exports_available_in_pro_message: Export history and automatic monthly exports are available in Pro. Upgrade to access export history and receive settled invoices by email on the first of each month.

account.title: Account Settings
account.manage_profile: Manage your profile, password, and subscription plan.
account.guest_account_backup_desc: Save a 24-word recovery phrase to sign in on another browser or device. Satflux never stores your phrase.
account.guest_recovery_enrolled: Recovery phrase is linked to this guest account.
account.guest_seed_unavailable_here: Seed is not available on this device. Use your 24-word phrase in the login restore flow.
account.guest_seed_modal_warning: Keep this phrase offline and private. Anyone with it can access your guest account.
account.guest_recovery_saved: Recovery phrase saved to your account.
account.guest_upgrade_desc: Add a permanent login method. Every path needs your real email and a password (for email login and recovery). Email-only uses email+password; Lightning/Nostr uses your linked login plus email+password.
account.guest_upgrade_linked_empty: Link Lightning or Nostr first in Login methods.
account.guest_upgrade_email_verify_notice: After you submit, we send a verification email to this address. Open it and click the link to confirm your email; until then some features may stay limited.
account.guest_upgrade_email_success: Guest upgraded. Open the email we just sent and click the verification link to confirm your address.
account.guest_upgrade_linked_success: Guest upgraded using linked login method.
account.pending_email_subtitle: Your account is almost ready. We sent a verification link — you need to open it once before all features unlock.
account.pending_email_step1: Open the inbox for the address below (and spam/junk if you do not see it).
account.pending_email_step2: Open the email from satflux and tap the verification link.
account.pending_email_step3: Return here and press "I've verified my email" so we can refresh your session.
account.pending_email_still_unverified: We still do not see a verified email on your account. Open the link in the latest message, wait a few seconds, then try again.
account.name: Name
account.trial_warning: You are in trial. Your access will be revoked in {days} days.
account.payment_reminder_notice: Payment reminder will be sent {days} days before expiration.
account.plan_desc_pro: Business invoicing and advanced features for growing businesses
account.credit_invoice_created: Credit invoice created. Please check your email for payment instructions.
account.add_credit_failed: Failed to add credit. Please try again.
account.checkout_failed: Failed to create checkout. Please try again.
account.login_methods_desc: You can add Lightning login to sign in with your wallet.
account.scan_qr_with_wallet: Scan the QR code with your Lightning wallet to link it.
account.or_confirm_with_lightning: Or confirm with your Lightning wallet

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Your BTCPay notifications
messages.not_available_subtitle: BTCPay notifications are not available for your account. If you need help, please contact support.
messages.empty_subtitle: When you receive notifications, they will appear here.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters

settings.title: Store Settings
settings.currency_placeholder: Select or type currency (e.g., USD, BTC, EUR)
settings.price_source_description: The recommended price source gets chosen based on the default currency.
settings.additional_settings_description: Additional store configuration options are managed through the SATFLUX interface. All settings that can be configured are available above or through other SATFLUX sections.
settings.failed_to_update: Failed to update settings. Please try again.

create_store.title: Create Store
create_store.store_created_hint: Your store is created. Choose how you want to receive payments.
create_store.bot_wait_hint: This usually takes about two minutes. Please keep this page open.
create_store.bot_result_support: Automatic configuration could not finish. Our team can complete this for you.
create_store.bot_result_timeout: Configuration is still in progress or timed out. You can continue to your store and check Wallet connection later.
create_store.currency_placeholder: Select or type currency (e.g., USD, BTC, EUR)
create_store.price_source_description: The recommended price source gets chosen based on the default currency.
create_store.blink_description: Use Blink wallet for fast and reliable Lightning payments.
create_store.aqua_description: Aqua or Bull Bitcoin Wallet with the Boltz plugin — non-custodial Lightning.
create_store.connection_string_help: Paste your Blink connection string with server URL, API key, and wallet ID.
create_store.descriptor_help: Paste your Aqua or Bull Bitcoin watch-only output descriptor (no private keys).
create_store.invalid_descriptor_format: Invalid descriptor. Use ct(slip77(...),elsh(wpkh(...))) for Aqua or ct(slip77(...),elwpkh(...)) for Bull Bitcoin.
create_store.wallet_brand_mismatch: Descriptor format does not match the selected wallet. Switch wallet or paste the correct descriptor.
create_store.cashu_description: Ecash with a Cashu mint: mint URL plus a Lightning Address for plugin routing.
create_store.failed_to_create: Failed to create store. Please try again.
create_store.samrock_hint_body: You can leave the descriptor empty and finish setup after the store is created: open Wallet connection for this store and use “Generate QR code”. Or paste the watch-only descriptor below now.
create_store.descriptor_optional_samrock: Optional if you will scan the SamRock QR in Wallet connection after creating the store.
create_store.aqua_configure_later: After create: Wallet connection (SamRock QR or descriptor)
create_store.aqua_summary_samrock: After creating the store you will finish pairing via SamRock QR on the Wallet connection page (QR generation starts automatically).

apps.title: Apps
apps.manage_apps: Manage point-of-sale, crowdfunding, and other apps for
apps.no_archived_apps_description: Apps you archive will appear here.
apps.name: Name
apps.no_apps_description: Create apps like Point of Sale or Crowdfunding campaigns to accept Bitcoin payments.
apps.app_name_placeholder: e.g., Main Store POS or Project Fundraiser
apps.crowdfund_description: Goal-based campaigns with a public contribution page
apps.tickets_description: Sell and manage event tickets with Bitcoin.
apps.raffles_description: Run tombola / raffle ticket sales via BTCPay.
apps.pay_button_header_subtitle: {store} — Configure and copy the embed HTML. Nothing is saved here.
apps.pos_callback_security_text: Never trust any field other than the invoice ID. Verify details with your backend.
apps.app_type_not_supported_description: Settings for this app type are not yet implemented.

tickets.title: Tickets
tickets.subtitle: Manage ticket events for
tickets.description_rich_hint: Formatting appears on the BTCPay ticket purchase page. Configure store SMTP in BTCPay to send ticket emails.
tickets.currency_hint: Display currency for ticket prices (e.g. EUR, USD)
tickets.raffle_bundle_hint: Each admission ticket can include raffle entries from an open raffle (included in the ticket price).
tickets.raffle_bundle_select_required: Select an open raffle when including raffle tickets per admission.
tickets.raffle_bundle_no_open: No raffles with sale open. Open a raffle first under Raffles.
tickets.redirect_url_hint: Optional. Where to send the customer after payment.
tickets.email_subject_hint: Plain text only — the plugin does not replace placeholders in the subject. You can edit the default.
tickets.email_body_placeholder: Defaults fill in when you create an event; add tokens below as needed.
tickets.email_placeholders_hint_prefix: For dynamic fields, use these tokens exactly (no spaces):
tickets.email_placeholders_hint_suffix: The plugin replaces them when sending the email.
tickets.event_limit_modal_message: You have reached the maximum number of events (1) per store on the Free plan. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited events.
tickets.no_events_description: Create your first event to start selling tickets with Bitcoin.
tickets.resend_missing_order: Order for this ticket was not found.
tickets.resend_smtp_not_configured: Store email (SMTP) is not configured in BTCPay.
tickets.cannot_delete_event_with_sold_tickets: Cannot delete an event that has sold tickets.
tickets.cannot_deactivate_event_with_ticket_type: Cannot deactivate an event that has ticket types configured.
tickets.cannot_deactivate_event_with_sold_ticket: Cannot deactivate an event that has sold tickets.
tickets.scan_hint: Click Start scanning to use the camera
tickets.enter_ticket_code: Enter ticket number or scan code

raffles.title: Raffles
raffles.subtitle: Manage tombola / raffle sales for your store
raffles.plugin_not_installed: The BTCPay Raffle plugin is not installed or enabled on this server.
raffles.no_raffles_description: Create a raffle to sell tickets on your BTCPay public page.
raffles.description_rich_hint: Formatting appears on the BTCPay public raffle purchase page.
raffles.public_link_hint: Buyers purchase tickets on BTCPay at this URL (not in Satflux).
raffles.confirm_open_body: Ticket sales will start on the public BTCPay page.
raffles.confirm_close_body: No more tickets can be purchased after closing.
raffles.confirm_draw_body: This is irreversible. One eligible ticket will be selected at random.
raffles.confirm_complete_body: The raffle will be marked finished. No further draws or sales.
raffles.presenter_hint: Open on a projector or second screen. Each click issues a new link (valid for a limited time). Draw winners from Satflux, then reveal them on the presentation page.
raffles.delete_raffle_hint: Permanently removes this raffle, all tickets, and draw history. Only available for drafts or completed raffles.
raffles.buyer_name_hint: Optional nickname shown in the ticket list and during draws.
raffles.manual_tickets_hint: For cash or bank transfers. Only while sales are open or closed and before the first draw.
raffles.limit_modal_message: You have reached the maximum number of raffles (1) per store on the Free plan. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited raffles.

landing.hero_kicker: The merchant control panel for BTCPay Server.
landing.hero_headline: Run Bitcoin checkout for your business.
landing.hero_subheadline: PoS, invoices, tickets, Lightning addresses & exports - one dashboard and simplicity
landing.hero_description: Connect Blink, Aqua, or Cashu (beta). We orchestrate BTCPay; your encrypted connection strings stay yours and sats settle straight to your wallet.
landing.hero_trust_line: Payments always route to your wallet - even if a plan lapses.
landing.hero_carousel_hint: 3 real merchant flows: sell, invoice, reconcile
landing.hero_slide_preview_body: We’ll drop in real screenshots from the panel here once the UI is final.
landing.hero_audience_explore_hint: You want steps, not server admin.
landing.hero_blurb_btcpay: With SATFLUX, stores are powered by BTCPay Server on our infrastructure - you run day-to-day merchant work here (multi-store, PoS, tickets, exports) while sats still reach your wallet. The hosted service does not support connecting a third-party BTCPay server. Want SATFLUX and BTCPay fully under your control? The project is open source on GitHub for self-hosting.
landing.hero_blurb_explore: You do not need to become a BTCPay power user overnight. SATFLUX walks your team through stores, wallets, and terminals while Bitcoin still lands in keys you control.
landing.section_clarity_title: BTCPay handles the protocol. SATFLUX handles the merchant work.
landing.section_clarity_body: SATFLUX builds on BTCPay Server: that engine handles payments while you work from this dashboard - stores, PoS, tickets, and exports your accountant can use. Bitcoin still settles to your wallet. Prefer to own the full stack? Self-host SATFLUX from GitHub alongside your own BTCPay Server.
landing.how_it_works_intro: Everything you need to know in a few simple steps.
landing.step1_text: Create your account and Store. It's fast and intuitive.
landing.step2_text: Connect your store with your Lightning wallet: Blink, Aqua, or Cashu (beta). Receive funds directly to you-we don't hold any sats.
landing.step3_text: Create different types of terminals: KeyPad, List, or List with Cart.
landing.step4_text: Generate an API key and connect with WooCommerce, Shopify, Magento, Drupal and others.
landing.step5_text: Launch a goal-based campaign with perks and deadlines. Contributors pay via BTCPay while you track progress in SATFLUX.
landing.step6_text: Create a personalized address NAME{'@'}{domain}. All sats go directly to your wallet.
landing.step7_text: Create events, sell tickets for sats, and control entry efficiently. Scan QR codes directly in our app or manually search by ticket number or email and mark as checked-in.
landing.step8_text: Sell raffle tickets on your public BTCPay page, draw winners in the app, and use presenter mode at events. You can bundle raffle entries with admission tickets.
landing.step8_presenter_hint: The user watches the draw on their device
landing.step9_text: Embed a simple payment button on your site or blog. Visitors pay through BTCPay checkout without running a full online store.
landing.step9_embed_hint: Copy the embed code from the app and paste it on your page.
landing.step10_text: Download CSV/PDF transaction exports compatible with standard accounting software.
landing.features_analytics_text: Detailed charts, overviews, and revenue exports for accounting.
landing.everything_you_need_description: Invoicing, PoS, event tickets, raffles, Lightning addresses, Crowdfunding, Pay Button, exports, and Lightning/ecash-merchant tooling built around BTCPay and self-custody.
landing.multi_store_description: Run multiple businesses from a single dashboard. Switch contexts instantly and keep your finances organized.
landing.point_of_sale_description: Customizable PoS keypads for retail or mobile usage.
landing.invoicing_description: Invoices, ISDOC/UBL export, and SK e-invoicing readiness - in one app with BTCPay.

invoicing_section.title: Business invoicing for merchants
invoicing_section.subtitle: Issue compliant invoices, match bank payments, and let customers pay by bank or Bitcoin - in the same app as your stores.

bullets.companies: Company profiles for EU (SK/CZ) and US jurisdictions
bullets.pay_by_square: Pay by Square QR on PDF invoices (SK/CZ)
bullets.structured_invoicing: ISDOC, Peppol UBL export, and SK e-invoicing via your digital postman (SAPI-SK)
bullets.btc_pay_link: Stable Bitcoin pay link and QR on each issued invoice
bullets.bank_matching: Bank statement import and payment matching by variable symbol
bullets.expenses: Supplier expenses with attachments and duplicates
bullets.recurring: Recurring invoice profiles with scheduled generation

invoicing_section.pro_note: Included in Pro (30-day trial). Your BTCPay payment acceptance keeps working even if Pro expires.
invoicing_section.positioning_text: Satflux combines BTCPay merchant tooling with accounting-grade invoicing. You do not need a separate payment app, another invoicing SaaS, and export scripts - Satflux is not a digital postman, but it prepares UBL and sends it through your CPDS.
invoicing_section.positioning_bullet_1: EU merchants: SK/CZ fields, variable symbol, Pay by Square, VIES VAT checks, e-invoicing from 2027.
invoicing_section.positioning_bullet_2: US LLC merchants: US company profile and sales-tax style line items.
invoicing_section.positioning_bullet_3: Optional Bitcoin checkout on every issued invoice.

compare.title: How Satflux compares
compare.subtitle: Satflux Pro vs Zaprite vs typical EU invoicing SaaS (e.g. SuperFaktúra, Fakturoid). Feature availability varies by plan and country.
compare.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly documented features as of 2026. Verify compliance requirements with your accountant for your jurisdiction.

rows.pay_by_square: Pay by Square on invoice PDF

notes.sk_cz_compliance: Satflux: SK/CZ PDF, VS, VIES; EU SaaS often broader local reporting
notes.isdoc_efaktura: Satflux: ISDOC + UBL export, SAPI-SK with your CPDS; EU SaaS often bundled postman

landing.feature_lightning_ecash_description: Take Lightning payments and optional Cashu settlements through your BTCPay store-fast checkout without giving us your keys.
landing.feature_lightning_ecash_bullet_ln: One Lightning setup per store: Blink (connection string), or Aqua/Bull (Boltz) via watch-only descriptor or SamRock QR (Aqua).
landing.feature_lightning_ecash_bullet_cashu: Cashu mint URL + Lightning address with plugin-backed settlement tracking in the app.
landing.feature_lightning_ecash_bullet_control: Encrypted connection strings stay yours; we orchestrate BTCPay, we don’t custody funds.
landing.feature_checkout_tools_intro: Go beyond invoices: sell access, share branded receive endpoints, and embed checkout on your site.
landing.feature_checkout_tools_bullet_tickets: Event tickets with QR check-in from the app.
landing.feature_checkout_tools_bullet_ln: Lightning Addresses routed to your connected wallet.
landing.feature_checkout_tools_bullet_pay: Embeddable Pay Button for blogs and landing pages (e-commerce uses BTCPay API keys).
landing.feature_checkout_tools_bullet_raffle: Raffles with public ticket sales, draws, and presenter mode.
landing.pricing_description: Pay with sats. No credit card required.
landing.pricing_hero_subheadline: Two plans. No hidden fees. Try Pro free for {days} days - annual billing in sats only.
landing.pricing_free_description: Everything you need to run one store with Point of Sale (PoS) terminals, a Lightning address, and basic reporting.
landing.pricing_pro_tagline: For growing businesses with multiple locations
landing.pricing_pro_description: Full business invoicing, expenses, and payment matching. Plus more stores, advanced stats, and automatic exports.
landing.pricing_need_more_text: For larger teams and custom requirements, we offer tailored plans with dedicated support.
landing.pricing_trust_text: Plans only affect management and automation features. Even if Pro expires, you still receive all Bitcoin and Lightning payments to your wallet. Your stores, PoS terminals, and payment links keep working.
landing.pricing_faq_custody_a: You do. Payments go directly to your wallet. We only provide the tools to accept them.
landing.pricing_faq_switch_a: Yes. Upgrade anytime. Downgrades take effect at the end of your billing period.
landing.pricing_faq_trial_q: How does the Pro free trial work?
landing.pricing_faq_trial_a: You get {days} days to try all Pro features, including Business Invoicing. If you do not pay when the trial ends, management features lock immediately (no grace on trial). Your stores, PoS, and Lightning addresses keep accepting payments. After a paid year, you still have {grace_days} days to renew before Pro locks. Renew anytime; your data stays saved.
landing.pricing_faq_expire_a: You keep receiving payments. After expiration you have {grace_days} more days to renew with continued Pro access (including invoicing). After that you lose Pro features until you renew.
landing.pricing_feature_advanced_stats: Advanced stats (per store, per PoS, overall)
landing.pricing_enterprise_cash_card: PoS: mark orders as "Paid in Cash" or "Paid by Card" (for accounting)
landing.cashu_beta_notice: Cashu support is in beta-expect changes.
landing.cashu_pros: Ecash and Lightning together; you choose the mint; great for experimentation.
landing.cashu_cons: Beta: a wrong mint URL or Lightning Address can still break payments-double-check your settings.

support.title: Contact & Support
support.subtitle: Need help? We're here for you.
support.documentation_description: Learn how to use satflux.io with our comprehensive guides
support.faq_description: Find answers to frequently asked questions
support.technical_support_description: For technical issues or questions about the service, contact our support team.
support.pricing_description: Questions about pricing, plans, or subscription upgrades.
support.login_description: To access support tools, please log in to your account.

next_steps.wallet_description: Use the checklist to quickly verify payments and settings after creating your store.

setup_wizard.title: Setup guide
setup_wizard.step_wallet_desc: After you finish store creation, your wallet (Blink, Aqua, or Cashu) is already linked to this store so you can accept Bitcoin and Lightning. If automated setup is still running, you will see the status on the store dashboard.
setup_wizard.step_wallet_why: Review or change credentials in Wallet connection. The verification checklist covers optional checks (Lightning, test payment, and similar).
setup_wizard.step_pos_desc: A Point of Sale app is a payment terminal for your store. You can create one or more PoS apps - for example one per physical counter or device.
setup_wizard.step_pos_why: Each PoS has its own products and settings. Use it on a tablet or phone to create invoices and accept in-person payments.
setup_wizard.step_ln_address_desc: A Lightning Address is a human-readable address (like you{'@'}yourstore.com) that customers can use to send you Lightning payments. It is optional but useful for tips, donations, or simple pay links.
setup_wizard.step_ln_address_why: You can create and manage Lightning addresses in the LN Address section. Each address is linked to this store's wallet.

onboarding.pos_1_body: Create your first PoS terminal here. Click this to add a new Point of Sale app, then name it and configure the style and products.
onboarding.pos_2_body: Choose how your terminal looks: Keypad (simple keypad for amounts), Product list (list of items), or List with cart (add items to a cart). We recommend Keypad to start. Click Keypad (Light) below.
onboarding.pos_3_body: Here you can add products, set prices, and for Keypad mode optionally show item selection. You can also expand Extra Settings for currency, tax, and checkout options.
onboarding.pos_4_body: When you're done, click Save Settings to store your configuration. Then click Open PoS to open the terminal in a new tab and start accepting payments.
onboarding.pos_5_body: You can manage your store anytime via Store settings: wallet, invoices, users, and more. Click the gear icon to open Store settings.

dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.description: Manage your platform content and users
